name: Pencil
description: Design tool extension for creating, editing, and exporting .pen design files in Antigravity IDE

name: Figma Sync
description: Sync Figma designs into Antigravity projects — import frames, components, and design tokens

name: Git Lens
description: Enhanced git visualization — inline blame, file history, branch comparison, and commit graph

name: Docker Explorer
description: Visual Docker container and image management within the Antigravity IDE

name: Tailwind CSS IntelliSense
description: Tailwind CSS autocomplete, syntax highlighting, and class sorting in Antigravity editor

name: Prettier
description: Opinionated code formatter supporting TypeScript, CSS, HTML, JSON, Markdown, and more
